title: Room-temperature-processed perovskite solar cells surpassing 24% efficiency

L2: Room-temperature fabrication of perovskite solar cells achieves over 24% power conversion efficiency
Low-temperature processing opens new possibilities for diverse solar cell applications
L3: Research demonstrating room-temperature processed perovskite solar cells surpassing 24% efficiency, establishing new possibilities for low-cost, scalable manufacturing of high-performance photovoltaic devices without high-temperature annealing steps
